title: Animal Garden - Harp Seal
description: This mod adds the harp seal as tamable mob to the frozen ocean biome!
body:
![bg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NvaiT3Fr/images/217b47a5c53b85eb1ae1fb7914fa3c1782cd93eb.gif)

This mod adds the harp seal as tamable mob to the frozen ocean biome!

They are piscivores, so they need **fish** items **for taming**.

And for breeding, they have to be in the water to be able to mate.

 

Because they are a bit shy they will **avoid players** (also polar bears).

They still fight back though when attacked!

 

They heal a bit when resting, eating food items from the ground or when fed by hand.

To get the food **they hunt fishes sometimes**, tamed ones only hunt if their health is not max.

Also at a random time they will stand up if not resting and flap their bellies.

 

Babies are always white colored (whitecoat).

While adults have some texture variants.(just a little different, not much)

When tamed and in following mode they will fight alongside their owner.

 

And at every 15-30 minutes **they molt** a bit (dropping leather, timer resets when the server stops, the minimum time can be changed in the config and the max time is always (minimum * 2))

(In reality they molt like once a year and its just their skin and some old fur, but here leather will be a better choice)

 

As mentioned they spawn in the frozen ocean biome

You can change this and other **spawn settings**
by editing the json files in the data -> biome tags and biome modifier folders
or via resource pack,

but in fabric some spawn settings like the weight, min, max have to be edited in the config file

 

**This mod currently supports:**

**Forge       26.1.x | 1.21.x | 1.20.1**

**Neoforge 26.1.x | 1.21.x**

**Fabric      26.1.x | 1.21.x | 1.20.1**


SEND ME A PRIVATE MESSAGE IF YOU NEED THE MOD IN A DIFFERENT VERSION OR IF YOU ENCOUNTER ANY BUGS AT CURSEFORGE

[https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/aquarius_playz/projects](https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/aquarius_playz/projects)
